title_en: Restaurants, Food Choice, and Preference Language
petrov_stage: Move the learner into restaurant choice and preference exchanges.
petrov_mission: Order a food or drink item and state one preference between two choices.
focus_targets: Venue words build from food or drink roots plus 馆
Food choice questions pivot around 还是

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 饭馆, 馆, 饭, 酒.
Listen to a line that uses Venue words build from food or drink roots plus 馆 and Food choice questions pivot around 还是 and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 饭馆, 馆, 饭, 酒.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Venue words build from food or drink roots plus 馆 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Order a food or drink item and state one preference between two choices.
Ask in Chinese: Do you prefer meat or fish?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 饭馆, 馆, 饭, 酒, 肉.
Which word in lesson 11 means seafood?
Which lesson-11 phrase means to prefer or like more?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 饭馆, 馆, 饭.
Produces one correct spoken line using Venue words build from food or drink roots plus 馆.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
